Hook: big promise  
\[Hank to camera\]

\[Callout text:   
SLICE-FIX SHORTCUT\]

Here’s how to SHORTCUT the time it takes to stop slicing on the course…

So you can become a better player faster. 

**Intro 2:**  
Hook: big promise  
Callout text:   
STOP SLICING

Here’s the FASTEST way to stop slicing the golf ball…

WITHOUT ~~DRILLS~~  
WITHOUT ~~THE RANGE~~  
WITHOUT ~~SWING CHANGES~~

WITHOUT any drills… 

WITHOUT hitting balls at the range…

Hook: open loop  
Callout text:  
IS YOUR DRIVER THE REASON YOU SLICE?

Callout text:   
THE HOTTEST GOLF   
**GIFT OF THE YEAR\!** 

Got a dad… brother… or husband who LOVES playing golf?

**Intro 5:**  
Hook: big promise  
Callout text:  
FINALLY\!

FINALLY\!

A driver that harnesses the most advanced ~~Formula 1~~ aerodynamic technology… 

Callout text:  
✔︎ ~~FORMULA 1~~ RACING TECH  
✔︎ SQUARES YOUR CLUBFACE  
✔︎ FIXES YOUR SLICE

To square your clubface automatically and FIX… YOUR… SLICE.

Callout text:   
THE HOTTEST GOLF   
**GIFT OF THE YEAR\!** 

Also change the “CLICK\!” text to “ANTI-SLICE\!” 

This brand-new driver is quickly becoming the most popular gift of the year for amateur golfers. 

It eliminates the hassle of hitting uncontrollable slices off the tee…

Callout text:

Callout text:   
HANK HANEY,   
WORLD’S \#1   
**SLICE-FIX COACH**

When Performance Golf first showed me the SF1…

I thought the idea was kinda crazy.

But after taking just ONE swing with the SF1… I was sold.

The SF1 is the most effective anti-slice driver I’ve ever seen…

Because instead of you trying to manipulate your clubface from setup to impact…

Callout text:   
7 RACING-INSPIRED FEATURES

Callout text:   
THE SLICE-FIX EFFECT

The SF1’s features COMBINE to create what’s called — the slice-fix effect.

TAKE YOUR NORMAL SWING

Meaning all you’ve gotta do is take your normal swing…

Play the same callout text I mentioned above:  
THE SF1 DRIVER SQUARES THE FACE FOR YOU

The secret to the SF1 is its Square Face Technology…

Which is the combination of 7 features specifically designed to square your clubface. 

Callout text:  
AEROSQUARE CROWN  
**CLOSES TOE FASTER**

Two of these features include an AeroSquare Crown that forces the toe to close faster in your downswing…

Callout text:  
COUNTER-SLICE WEIGHTS  
**TURNS THE FACE OVER**

And two Counter-Slice Weights that automatically turn the face over through impact. 

Play the same callout text I mentioned above:  
THE SF1 DRIVER SQUARES THE FACE FOR YOU

That means instead of you trying to STEER your driver off the tee…

You’ll crunch more shots out of the center WITHOUT changing your swing.    

The SF1 was brought to market by the fastest-growing online golf company — Performance Golf.

Their mission is to do the OPPOSITE of traditional golf companies.

Instead of forcing customers to buy a big-name driver that’s designed for the pros…

They set out to build a club specifically for the 90% of golfers who slice — and they succeeded. 

And since then, the SF1 has transformed THOUSANDS of amateur swings — almost overnight.  

Short, punchy testimonials x2

Play the same callout text I mentioned above:  
THE SF1 DRIVER SQUARES THE FACE FOR YOU

Now Performance Golf wants to put the SF1 in YOUR hands…

And they finally made the next batch available to the public.

Exactly the same style of CTA you did in tsst 00004, just keeping the callout text what I mentioned a few lines above and changing the % off. 

To celebrate the new inventory…

The SF1 is 73 percent off.

The SF1 is 40 percent off.

So click through to the next page now…

And you can get an SF1 driver for yourself or a loved one at a 73% discount.

And you can get an SF1 driver for yourself or a loved one at a 40% discount.

Performance Golf is so confident the SF1 will eliminate your slice on the course…

They’re offering a 100% money-back guarantee for 365 days… which is unheard of.

With the SF1…

You can STOP focusing on swing changes…  

STOP searching for the answer on YouTube... 

And STOP trying to hit big-name drivers built for the pros.

Play the same callout text I mentioned above:  
THE SF1 DRIVER SQUARES THE FACE FOR YOU

Because the SF1’s seven features ALL combine to square the face FOR YOU…

Callout text:  
WITHOUT CHANGING YOUR SWING

Meaning you can hit straighter tee shots WITHOUT making a SINGLE change to your swing. 

And the best part is…

Callout text:  
PLAY REAL GOLF

Amateurs just like you… are FINALLY having the confidence to pull the driver out of their bag… and play REAL golf. 

Again, keep the exact same style of CTA banner etc, except for this ad, keep the \#\#% discount running on the left the whole time. 

Because unlike big-name drivers that are nearly impossible to control…

The SF1 works WITH your natural swing to square the face through impact. 

So if you're looking to get an SF1 for yourself or a loved one…

Click through to the next page now… and you'll be taken to the official website to order.

After all… we both know no one loves golf more than you do.

So why not shortcut the time it takes to stop slicing… so you become a better player?

And sure… maybe you don't play golf yourself…

But what about your dad… brother… or husband?

Imagine the look on their face when they open a gift like this one…

And realize you just solved their BIGGEST problem on the golf course.

Wouldn't that be worth it?

Now since the SF1 is selling like crazy right now…

[Carbon—The New Driving Force in Golf | TaylorMade Golf](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GSgJJgxmk7U)  
[New Rogue Driver || TV Commercial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zm9PwP38-fY)  
[The Callaway Epic Flash Driver with Flash Face Technology - TV Commercial](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J41W0EgSj0Q)

SF1 animation  
Callout text: MEET THE SF1 ANTI-SLICE DRIVER

When Performance Golf sat down to design the SF1 anti-slice driver…

Donnie)* hitting the SF1 driver probably from 45 degrees FO, FO, RDTL. If possible, make sure the footage is of the golfers smiling, etc, so it looks like they’re having fun/more relaxed. **The purpose is to show viewers how the SF1 was built BY us FOR golfers like us.**

Whichever members of the PG team we have for these two lines, please add their name and their title at PG. eg. Donnie French, Copy Chief or Paul Schlegel, Director of Video Production

They didn’t decide to build the longest-hitting driver in the world.

They decided to engineer the kind of driver they themselves enjoyed using.

Callout text: BALANCE

They looked for synergy…

Another actor swinging

Because your driver should be an extension of your body. 

Another actor swinging

And they demanded control… 

Because your driver should be as easy to turn as the steering wheel in your car. 

Animation from the VSL of ~~F1~~ car turning a corner as the clubhead turns through impact

As a result…

Callout text 2: SWING FREELY

Square the face for you… so you can swing freely.

It’s no surprise then…

That the modern amateur is turning from the “one-size-fits-all” drivers built for the pros…

### **\[sf1-0004 \- pc \- features \- ben \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

**\[Format \= Education\]**

\[This is going to require a very cool graphic/animation. I’m picturing the full club spinning like some of our other clubs’ hero animations. And as Hank mentions each feature I want the club to light up, and have some kind of magnification effect that highlights the feature and makes it take up a lot more of the screen.\]

**Intro 1:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

THIS is the SF1.

It’s the first driver where EVERY SINGLE FEATURE has ONE purpose:

Make it IMPOSSIBLE for you to slice…

On the course…

When it counts.

\[skip first line of body\]

**Intro 2:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

This is the SF1…

The first slice-fix driver where EVERY SINGLE FEATURE is engineered to make it IMPOSSIBLE for you to slice.

\[skip first line of body\]

**Intro 3:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

THIS is the SF1…

The first driver where EVERY feature is engineered and working together to do ONE thing:

Produce the Slice-Fix Effect…

That squares your clubface to the path – FOR YOU…

On the course… when it matters.

\[skip first line of body\]

**Intro 4:**

Picture this:

Tight fairway.

Trees down the left.

OB right.

And instead of stepping up to the tee with an iron or fairway wood…

Without even a moment of doubt…

You reach into your bag…

Pull out the SF1 slice-fix driver…

And feel full ON-COURSE confidence to hit your drive EXACTLY where it needs to go.

Because you know…

You have the ONLY driver…

Where all the features are designed to do ONE thing:

Fix your slice on the course…

When the pressure’s on.

\[skip first line of the body\]

**Intro 4:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

THIS is the first slice-fix driver…

With Square Face Technology inspired by Formula 1… 

That squares your clubface relative to the path… FOR YOU.

**Intro 5:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

THIS is the first slice fix solution inspired by the master craftsmanship of Formula 1… 

To square your clubface to the path FOR YOU…

And eliminate the ROOT CAUSE of your slice.

**Intro 6:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

THIS is the first driver with Square Face Technology…

The ONLY driver technology where EVERY feature is engineered and working together to do ONE thing:

Produce the Slice-Fix Effect…

That squares your clubface to the path – FOR YOU…

On the course… when it matters.

**Intro 7:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

This is the FIRST driver…

Where EVERY SINGLE FEATURE is designed to do one thing:

Eliminate the ROOT CAUSE of your slice…

By squaring your clubface to the path… FOR YOU.

**Intro 8:**

Hi, I’m Tiger Woods’ former coach Hank Haney.

I’ve been coaching amateurs for over 40 years…

And fixed over 200,000 slices.

And after researching, buying, and testing literally EVERY “slice-fix” driver available today… 

It became pretty obvious: 

No driver technology has EVER been engineered with ALL the features working together…

To fix the ROOT CAUSE of your slice FOR YOU.

So if YOU’RE an amateur who slices the ball…

That means there’s NEVER been a driver with its ENTIRE DESIGN focused on eliminating your slice.

Until NOW.

**Body:**

\[Haney holding SF1. As he reads each feature point/gesture to it on the club\]

It’s called the SF1…

And after 18 months of rigorous experimentation…

Hundreds of iterations… 

And testing dozens of innovative new driver features inspired by Formula 1 racing… 

Its Square Face Technology was born.

And right now…

I want to quickly walk you through the SF1’s features…

That make it literally IMPOSSIBLE to slice.

First up is the AeroSquare Crown.

We carved “direction-control” channels on the top of the club that redirect airflow…

And force the toe to close FAST in the downswing.

And THESE are the Takeaway Tracks.

They give you visual feedback that dials in your FIRST move off the ball…

And gets your swing on the perfect path from the START.

And this is Anti-Slice Face Curvature.

It’s made from state-of-the-art F1-grade materials…

And produces guaranteed draw-spin – even when you miss the center of the face.

And these right here… are the Counter-Slice Weights.

We used AI to analyze thousands of slicers’ golf swings…

And found the BEST place to add weight to “auto square” your clubface…

Is the lower back of the head.

Then we fixed weights in this perfect position…

So you never have to adjust ‘em or guess if they’re in the right spot.

Next up is the Draw-Calibrated Face Angle.

It looks, feels, and SITS like a NORMAL driver…

But the face is actually 3 degrees shut.

So you get all benefits of an offset design…

With a driver that looks good enough to leave the headcover off.

Now the next feature is a little controversial.

We added TWELVE degrees of Square Launch Loft…

Because believe it or not…

The BIGGEST problem I see with amateur slicers is not enough loft on their driver.

And then we made sure the SF1’s lie angle is more upright…

So you can shallow your clubhead along the perfect path to square the face.

And last but not least…

We included a premium Counterbalanced F1 Shaft…

Inspired by Formula 1’s “life or death” quality standards.

Put all this together and what do you get?

The FIRST driver that combines EVERY known slice-fixing feature…

Into ONE technology…

That squares your clubface relative to the path FOR YOU…

And makes it LITERALLY impossible to slice.

**Close:**

If you wanna put the POWER of Square Face Technology into YOUR bag….

AND capitalize on a launch special that includes a BIG discount and FREE shipping…

Click over to the next page now and get YOUR SF1.

AND… if you’re not BLOWN AWAY by your dead-straight drives…

You’re backed by a 365-day, 100% money-back guarantee.

THAT’S how confident we are you’re gonna love the SF1.

So grab yours now while you can…

And make today the LAST day you suffer from a slice.

### **\[sf1-0005 \- pc \- Here’s How It Works \- Mike \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

**Ad type:** Guru  
**Structure:** Tutorial

**Hook:** Big Promise  
**Scroll Stopper:** POV

Some of the PROOF clips at the end of the intros could be the same. Try to fit the clip you choose with the intro itself. Make sure the PROOF clips are related to claims in the previous line(s).

**Intro 1:**

Callout Text:   
TIGER’S FORMER COACH   
PRESENTS…  
\[SF1 Logo\]

THIS – is the SF1.

It’s the FIRST EVER slice-fixing driver built specifically for amateurs…

That gives you NO CHOICE but to hit long, straight drives down the center of every fairway.

PROOF \- High energy reaction and one-liner

**Intro 2:**

Callout Text: INTRODUCING…  
\[SF1 Logo\]

Introducing the SF1…

A revolutionary new anti-slice driver…

That squares the face for you…

And puts you in total control on the tee box.

PROOF \- High energy reaction and one-liner

**Intro 3:**

Callout Text \- native: Check out this new anti-slice driver 🏌️  
Awesome looking product shots.

This new anti-slice driver has changed amateur golf forever.

\[PAUSE\]

Powered by Square Face Technology…

The SF1 is guaranteed to fix the root cause of your slice…

So you can immediately start hitting longer, straighter drives…

And set yourself up for more pars and birdies.

PROOF \- High energy reaction and one-liner

**Intro 4:**

Callout Text: TIGER’S FORMER COACH

Tiger’s former coach Hank Haney here with the SF1…

And if you regularly slice the golf ball…

Then you NEED this new anti-slice driver.

PROOF \- High energy reaction and one-liner

**Intro 5:**

Callout Text \- native:   
New driver tech \= fastest slice-fix 🔥

This new driver tech is the fastest AND easiest way to fix your slice.

Introducing…

The SF1.

PROOF \- High energy reaction and one-liner

**Body:**

Here’s how it works.

First…

The ~~F1-inspired~~ AeroSquare Crown FORCES the SF1’s toe to move faster in the downswing…

Squaring the face EARLIER in your swing… 

To give you ultimate control… 

And launch your ball straighter and longer than your regular driver.

Hank Haney here… 

\[add credibility text for Hank: “Golf Digest Top 50 Teacher, Tiger’s Former Coach, Golf Coaching Hall of Fame Inductee 2019\]

Sounds crazy right… 

Well check this out. 

**Body:**

Hi, I’m Hank Haney… 

\[add credibility text for Hank: “Golf Digest Top 50 Teacher, Tiger’s Former Coach, Golf Coaching Hall of Fame Inductee 2019\]

And while I’ve become known for helping hundreds of thousands of golfers fix their slice… 

I’ve NEVER, in my 40+ years of coaching…

EVER seen something that fixes a slice faster or more effectively than this.

\[Quick SF1 hero shots, cut to amateurs bombing drives with SF1 show shot tracers and reactions\]

It’s called the SF1…

\[Add CTA text for FB/YT around the \~27-30 second mark\]

And it uses concealed technology ~~inspired by Formula 1 racing~~… 

\[ Want to use some F1 footage here, but it’d be great to use something that shows the similarities between F1 cars and SF1 swing path,  that way, it sets up the link between F1 car and SF1 driver clubhead tech. Likely want something similar to SF1-VSL-53\]

To automatically square your clubface for you…

And eliminate your slice FOR good.  

\[Let’s show clip SF1-VSL-61 (or similar) \- ROBOT OR GEARS TEST (Rick Smith has Gears): Standard driver VS SF1 \- slow motion from bird’s eye view (over head) of the face closing faster before and at impact\]

So you can swing with full confidence…

And know your ball will find the middle of the fairway again and again. 

On top of that, because you’re making flush contact…

You’ll be driving the ball up to 35 yards farther than before.

All without changing your grip or swing. 

(slight pause from Hank as we show proof of amateurs bombing shots with the SF1)

\[B roll of golfers bombing multiple drives with the SF1\]

So, if you’re ready to join these golfers…

Drive the ball farther than ever before… 

And play from the middle of the fairway more often…

Click through now and get all the details on this revolutionary driver…

That’s guaranteed to eliminate your slice and help you play the BEST golf of your life.

###    **\[sf1-0011 \- pc \- contrarian \- ben \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

**\[Format \= Education\]**

**Intro 1:**

To fix your slice…

STOP focusing on swing changes…  

STOP searching for the answer on YouTube... 

And STOP falling for mass-market drivers built for the pros.

Because NONE of these so called “solutions” address the ROOT CAUSE of your slice:

An open clubface relative to the path.

That’s why you need a driver technology that squares your face to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause until you do that…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 2:** 

\[Haney holding offset and heel-weighted driver\]

Here’s what NOT to do if you wanna fix your slice:

\[Haney tosses offset driver\]

Do NOT use an offset driver.

\[Haney tosses heel-weighted driver\]

Do NOT use a heel-weighted driver.

And do NOT try to make swing changes like flipping your wrists…

Keeping the clubface square from setup to impact…

Or swinging “inside out”.

Cause the truth is…

NONE of these “solutions” address the ROOT CAUSE of your slice:

An open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

*From intro 1:*

That’s why you need a driver technology that squares your face to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause until you do that…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 3:**

\[Haney holding an offset driver\]

If you want to fix your slice…

\[Haney tosses offset driver\]

Do NOT use an offset driver.

On top of being UGLY…

The offset face aims left at address…

So you’re gonna have a tendency to OPEN the face even more as you swing.

And a MORE open face…

Means an EVEN bigger slice.

And as I’m sure you know by now…

The ONE reason you slice is an open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

*From intro 1:*

That’s why you need a driver technology that squares your face to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause until you do that…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 4:**

\[Haney holding and tosses an offset driver\]

DO NOT use an offset driver if you wanna fix your slice.

*From intro 3:* 

On top of being UGLY…

The offset face aims left at address…

So you’re gonna have a tendency to OPEN the face even more as you swing.

And a MORE open face…

Means an EVEN bigger slice.

And as I’m sure you know by now…

The ONE reason you slice is an open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

That’s why you need a driver technology that squares your face to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause until you do that…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 5:**

\[Haney holding a heel-weighted driver\]

If you wanna fix your slice…

\[Haney tosses heel-weighted driver\]

Do NOT use a heel-weighted driver.

Sure, the weights make it a little easier to close the face…

But weight in the heel moves the sweet spot closer to the heel too. 

So even when you DO find the middle of the face…

The driver feels and performs like a mis-hit.

And on top of the terrible feel…

The truth is…

Heel-weighted drivers do NOT address the REAL reason you slice:

An open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

*From intro 1:*

That’s why you need a driver technology that squares your face to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause until you do that…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 6:**

\[Haney holding and tosses a heel-weighted driver\]

Do NOT use a heel-weighted driver if you want to fix your slice.

*From intro 5:*

Sure, the weights make it a little easier to close the face…

But weight in the heel moves the sweet spot closer to the heel too. 

So even when you DO find the middle of the face…

The driver feels and performs like a mis-hit.

And on top of the terrible feel…

The truth is…

Heel-weighted drivers do NOT address the REAL reason you slice:

An open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

That’s why you need a driver technology that squares your face to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause until you do that…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 7:**

You do NOT need another “slice fix”.

You need a driver technology that squares the clubface to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause the truth is…

Until you fix the ROOT CAUSE of your slice…

And square your clubface relative to the path…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 8:**

To fix your slice…

You do NOT need another “swing fix”...

Like flipping your wrists through impact…

Keeping the clubface square throughout the swing…

Or swinging inside out.

*From intro 7:*

You need a driver technology that squares the clubface to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause the truth is…

Until you fix the ROOT CAUSE of your slice…

And square your clubface relative to the path…

Nothing else matters.

**Body:**

You can have the posture and setup position of a pro…

A tour-like release…

And you can even spend months or years grooving that coveted inside-out swing path.

IT DOESN’T MATTER.

Because unless your clubface is square relative to the path of your swing…

You will slice.

Period.

And if you’re like 99% of amateurs…

The “swing fixes” you practice on the range…

BREAK DOWN under pressure on the course – when it counts.

That’s why you do NOT need another “swing fix” for your slice.

You need a DRIVER TECHNOLOGY that squares the face to the path… FOR YOU.

Until now… that tech didn’t exist…

So we engineered the FIRST driver with Square Face Technology…

That uses aerodynamic principles ~~borrowed from Formula 1…~~

To square the clubface to the path… FOR YOU.

\[toss SF1 to Haney and he catches it and continues reading\]

It’s called the SF1…

And it’s the FIRST slice-fix driver that combines ALL the known solutions for squaring the clubface at impact…

Into ONE club that does ONE thing:

Square your face to the path FOR YOU.

And that means ONE result:

Dead straight drives.

It was designed by a guy who’s spent 20 years innovating driver technology at TITLEIST…

And 35 years dialing in clubs for legends like Tiger Woods, Rory Mcllroy, and Ernie Els… just to name a few.

AND… I watched with my own two skeptical eyes as the SF1’s Square Face Technology…

Completely reversed slice after slice… 

On the VERY first swing... 

For DOZENS of golfers who tried it. 

**Close:**

And now…

The SF1 is FINALLY available to the public.

So… if you wanna learn more about the features inside Square Face Technology…

That square your face to the path FOR YOU…

AND grab YOUR SF1 for a steep discount and FREE shipping…

Click over to the next page now while they’re still in stock.

**sf1-0011 – Body \+ Close (cutdown):**

~~A tour-like release…~~

~~And you can even spend months or years grooving that coveted inside-out swing path.~~

~~IT DOESN’T MATTER.~~

~~Period.~~

Into ONE club that does ONE thing:

Square your face to the path FOR YOU.

### **\[sf1-0012 \- pc \- loft lies \- ben \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

**\[Format \= Education\]**

**Intro 1:**

If you wanna hit longer, straighter tee shots… 

Here’s why you need MORE loft on your driver.

\[Haney improv on why less loft hurts slicers, and more loft helps slicers\]

**Intro 2:**

If you slice…

Here’s why you need MORE loft on your driver.

\[Haney improv on why less loft hurts slicers, and more loft helps slicers\]

**Intro 3:**

If you slice the ball…

And you’ve got less than 12 degrees of loft on your driver…

I want you to take Ol’ Slicer out behind the tool shed and put him outta his misery.

Cause that low loft driver is KILLING you off the tee…

Causing nasty slices…

And robbing a LOTTA from ya.

**Intro 4:**

Do NOT believe the “loft lies”...

Because the TRUTH is…

To reach your maximum distance potential off the tee…

You need a driver with MORE loft.

**Intro 5:**

BIG hitters on Tour like Tony Finau, Jason Day, Charles Howell, and Brooks Koepka…

All use 10 and a half degrees of loft…

And average… AVERAGE – over 300 yards off the tee.

So WHY ON EARTH do YOU have a 9 and a half… or heaven forbid… an 8 and a half-degree driver in YOUR bag…

And think you need LESS LOFT to GAIN DISTANCE?\!

The truth is…

You need MORE loft to gain distance.

**Intro 6:**

Do you think you need LESS LOFT to gain distance?

Lots of golfers do…

But these “loft lies” are one of the main reasons you SLICE the ball…

AND hit drives that are SHORTER than you’d like.

BUT… if you use your common sense for even a second…

You’ll realize your launch arc is THE biggest limiting factor on how far you hit the ball.

Cause the lower you hit the ball…

The LESS distance you’re gonna carry it, right?\!

**Intro 7:**

The BIGGEST problem I see for most amateurs who slice their driver is…

NOT ENOUGH LOFT.

Seriously.

If I’ve seen it once… I’ve seen it FIFTY THOUSAND TIMES.

An amateur comes to me slicing…

For most golfers that means a high right shot…

So they think… “That’s too high, I need less loft.”

BUT reducing loft OPENS the clubface even more.

And since the ONE REASON you slice is an OPEN clubface relative to the path…

Less loft means you’re gonna hit the ball even FARTHER right.

PLUS…

On the rare occasion you square the face and DON’T hit a slice…

You’re closing the face and delofting the club.

So now you turned that 8 or 9-degree driver into 6 or 7 degrees…

And hit that short weak shot to the left.

THAT’S WHY…

If you want to fix your slice and hit LONGER, HIGHER, STRAIGHTER drives…

You need MORE loft on your driver.

**Body:**

\[Haney holding SF1\]

That’s why I INSISTED the new SF1 driver comes with 12 degrees of Square Launch Loft.

\[Use with intro 7\]

Which is why I INSISTED the new SF1 driver comes with 12 degrees of Square Launch Loft.

Because if I had a dollar for every time I had to ADD loft to a slicer’s driver…

A slicer who for some ungodly reason thinks they need LESS loft to correct their slice… 

Let’s just say I could hire Jeff Bezos as my personal assistant.

And I don’t care what “Loft Lies” you’ve heard before.

The SF1’s 12 degrees of Square Launch Loft is hand-picked by ME…

A guy who’s fixed over 200,000 slices. 

So when I tell you that having 12 degrees of loft is gonna HELP you square the face EASIER… 

And launch more controlled tee shots…

Believe me… it’s an undeniable fact.

But loft is just ONE of the features…

That makes the SF1 the ultimate, NO-FAIL slice fix.

See…

I teamed up with a world-renowned club engineer…

Who’s spent 20 years innovating driver technology at TITLEIST…

And 35 years dialing in clubs for legends like Tiger Woods, Rory Mcllroy, and Ernie Els.

And we made sure the SF1 is the first and ONLY driver…

That combines EVERY known slice-fixing feature…

Into ONE technology…

That squares your clubface relative to the path FOR YOU…

And makes it LITERALLY impossible to slice.

**Close:**

To see the OTHER patented features that make up this revolutionary technology…

AND experience what we call “the slice fix effect” for YOURSELF…

Click through to the next page to grab YOUR SF1.

But act fast…

Because during this launch the SF1 is 73% off…

Ships FREE anywhere in the US…

And is backed by our industry-leading 365-day money-back guarantee.

So click through to the next page now while this batch is still in stock…

Add the SF1 to YOUR golf bag…

And NEVER hit another slice.

### **\[sf1-0001 \- pc \- best gift sf1 \- christopher \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

**Intro 1: (sf1-0001-v0025)**

Here’s how to SHORTCUT the time it takes to stop slicing on the course…

So you can become a better player faster. 

**Intro 2: (sf1-0001-v0026)**

Here’s the FASTEST way to stop slicing the golf ball… 

WITHOUT any drills… 

WITHOUT hitting balls at the range…

And WITHOUT making a SINGLE change to your swing. 

Impossible? Watch this…

**Intro 3: (sf1-0001-v0027)**

Is your DRIVER the reason you can’t stop slicing?

**Intro 4: (sf1-0001-v0028)**

Know any ladies who LOVE playing golf?

**Intro 5: (sf1-0001-v0029)**

FINALLY\!

A driver that squares your clubface automatically and FIXES… YOUR… SLICE. 

**Body \+ Close (ALSO INTRO 6): (sf1-0001-v0030)**

This brand-new driver is quickly becoming the most popular gift of the year for amateur golfers. 

It eliminates the hassle of hitting uncontrollable slices off the tee…

By combining 7 slice-correcting features into ONE revolutionary club. 

When Performance Golf first showed me the SF1…

I thought the idea was kinda crazy.

But after taking just ONE swing with the SF1… I was sold. 

And I knew it would help MILLIONS of amateurs who’ve tried EVERYTHING to fix their slice.

The SF1 is the most effective anti-slice driver I’ve ever seen…

Because instead of you trying to manipulate your clubface from setup to impact…

The SF1 features work TOGETHER to square the face FOR YOU.

Before I explain how it works…

I wanted to let you know that it’s on sale today…

And you can get one by clicking through to the next page now. 

The secret to the SF1 is its Square Face Technology…

Which is the combination of 7 features specifically designed to square your clubface. 

Two of these features include an AeroSquare Crown that forces the toe to close faster in your downswing…

And two Counter-Slice Weights that automatically turn the face over through impact. 

That means instead of you trying to STEER your driver off the tee…

You’ll crunch more shots out of the center WITHOUT changing your swing.    

The SF1 was brought to market by the fastest-growing online golf company — Performance Golf.

Their mission is to do the OPPOSITE of traditional golf companies.

Instead of forcing customers to buy a big-name driver that’s designed for the pros…

They set out to build a club specifically for the 90% of golfers who slice — and they succeeded. 

And since then, the SF1 has transformed THOUSANDS of amateur swings — almost overnight.  

Now Performance Golf wants to put the SF1 in YOUR hands…

And they finally made the next batch available to the public.

To celebrate the new inventory…

The SF1 is 40 percent off.

So click through to the next page now…

And you can get an SF1 driver for yourself or a loved one at a 40% discount.

Performance Golf is so confident the SF1 will eliminate your slice on the course…

They’re offering a 100% money-back guarantee for 365 days… which is unheard of.

With the SF1…

You can STOP focusing on swing changes…  

STOP searching for the answer on YouTube... 

And STOP trying to hit big-name drivers built for the pros.

Because the SF1’s seven features ALL combine to square the face FOR YOU…

Meaning you can hit straighter tee shots WITHOUT making a SINGLE change to your swing. 

And the best part is…

Amateurs just like you… are FINALLY having the confidence to pull the driver out of their bag… and play REAL golf. 

Because unlike big-name drivers that are nearly impossible to control…

The SF1 works WITH your natural swing to square the face through impact. 

So if you're looking to get an SF1 for yourself or a loved one…

Click through to the next page now… and you'll be taken to the official website to order.

After all… we both know no one loves golf more than you do.

So why not shortcut the time it takes to stop slicing… so you become a better player?

And sure… maybe you don't play golf yourself…

But what about your family or friends?

Imagine the look on their face when they open a gift like this one…

And realize you just solved their BIGGEST problem on the golf course.

Wouldn't that be worth it?

Now since the SF1 is selling like crazy right now…

Take action now and get the best gift of the year for golfers at a huge 40% discount…

Before we’re out of stock.

**Body \+ Close:**

Hi, I’m Erika Larkin… Golf Digest Top 50 coach.

And after eliminating over 50,000 amateur slices in the last 20 years…

I’ve finally discovered the SINGLE… most EFFECTIVE way to STOP slicing off the tee. 

It’s called Square Face Technology…

And it’s like a cruise control setting for your driver. 

It’s SO simple… you only need to take your natural swing…

And Square Face Technology reverses your body’s slicing habit—by squaring the face FOR YOU.

This means…

You can swing naturally… with LESS effort…

But strike the center of the clubface more consistently… for straighter, longer tee shots. 

Simply take your regular swing… 

Let the Square-Face features close the face for you at impact… 

And your slice is gone. 

Literally – in the same amount of time it’s taken you to watch this video…

Square Face Technology starts eliminating your slice – forever.

Whether you’re just getting started or played all your life…

There’s no fairway you can’t hit with Square Face Technology in your hands.     

So if you want a quick… simple… and proven way to END that humiliating slice… 

While boosting your distance… accuracy… and confidence off the tee…

### **\[sf1-0003 \- pc \- sf1 commercial \- christopher \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

Editor note: The a-roll for this ad is contained in the ad 2 footage

When Performance Golf sat down to design the SF1 anti-slice driver…

They didn’t decide to build the longest-hitting driver in the world.

They decided to engineer the kind of driver they themselves enjoyed using. 

They believed in achieving perfect balance…

Because a driver should be a joy to swing… even when you’re not swinging well. 

They looked for synergy…

Because your driver should be an extension of your body. 

And they demanded control… 

Because your driver shoul cd be as easy to turn as the steering wheel in your car. 

So they sought inspiration from the most technologically advanced vehicles to ever be invented.

They employed some of the most respected craftsmen in the golf industry… to bring it to life. 

And if a feature didn’t work to square the clubface at impact…

They removed it… or redesigned it until it did. 

As a result…

Performance Golf has just created the first-ever driver ENGINEERED for amateurs to AERODYNAMICALLY stop a slice.

We’ve produced—through endless experimentation—SEVEN features that work together to do ONE thing…

Square the face for you… so you can swing freely. 

It’s no surprise then…

That the modern amateur is turning from the “one-size-fits-all” drivers built for the pros…

And finally giving themselves the freedom to play REAL, slice-free golf. 

To see what the SF1 can do for you…

The data… 

And the sheer excitement from golf enthusiasts just like you… 

Who are getting the SAME results they’ve always wanted from their driver…

Without changing a single thing about their swing.

### **\[sf1-0005 \- pc \- Here’s How It Works \- Mike \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

**Intro 1: (sf1-0005-v0068)**

THIS – is the SF1.

It’s the FIRST EVER slice-fixing driver built specifically for amateurs…

That gives you NO CHOICE but to hit long, straight drives down the center of every fairway.

**Intro 2: (sf1-0005-v0069)**

Introducing the SF1…

A revolutionary new anti-slice driver…

That squares the face for you…

And puts you in total control on the tee box.

**Intro 3: (sf1-0005-v0070)**

This new anti-slice driver has changed amateur golf forever.

\[PAUSE\]

Powered by Square Face Technology…

The SF1 is guaranteed to fix the root cause of your slice…

So you can immediately start hitting longer, straighter drives…

And set yourself up for more pars and birdies.

**Intro 4: (sf1-0005-v0071)**

Golf Digest Top 50 Coach Erika Larkin here with the SF1…

And if you regularly slice the golf ball…

Then you NEED this new anti-slice driver.

**Intro 5: (sf1-0005-v0072)**

This new driver tech is the fastest AND easiest way to fix your slice.

Introducing…

The SF1.

**Body:**

Here’s how it works.

First…

The AeroSquare Crown FORCES the SF1’s toe to move faster in the downswing…

Squaring the face EARLIER in your swing… 

To give you ultimate control… 

And launch your ball straighter and longer than your regular driver.

\[PAUSE\]

Second…

The Anti-Slice Face Curvature gives you something ALL slicers need…

Forgiveness.

That’s why this brand-new clubface technology…

Has been designed to produce a guaranteed draw-spin…

Even when you miss the center of the face.

\[PAUSE\]

Next are the Fixed Counter-Slice Weights.

\[PAUSE\]

Specially calibrated using advanced AI computers…

They perfectly balance the clubhead’s Center of Gravity…

To auto-square the face in the bottom of the swing arc…

And help counteract your slice every single time.

\[PAUSE\]

And finally…

We have the Counterbalanced ~~F1~~ Shaft.

\[PAUSE\]

Inspired by Samurai sword artisans…

This work of honor, craftsmanship and beauty…

Has ONE functional benefit:

To give your clubhead the ultimate control you need…

To square the face to your path at impact. 

\[PAUSE\]

The SF1 was invented by a club innovation legend…

Who’s worked with some of the biggest names in golf…

And it works for ANY golfer who wants to eliminate their slice…

And add effortless distance with pinpoint accuracy.

\[PAUSE\]

So if you’d like to get your hands on never-seen-before driver technology…

That gives you no choice but to stop your slice…

And gives you the confidence to launch higher, straighter drives…

Every time you step up to the tee box…

Then click over to the next page now…

And test drive the SF1 today.

### **\[sf1-0011 \- pc \- contrarian \- ben \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

**\[Format \= Education\]**

**Intro 1: (sf1-0011-v0011)**

**Type: Guru**  
**Structure: Tutorial**

To fix your slice…

STOP focusing on swing changes…  

STOP searching for the answer on YouTube... 

And STOP falling for mass-market drivers built for the pros.

Because NONE of these so called “solutions” address the ROOT CAUSE of your slice:

An open clubface relative to the path.

That’s why you need driver technology that squares your face to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause until you do that…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 2: (sf1-0011-v0012)**

**Type: Guru**  
**Structure: Tutorial**  
**Angle: Controversy**  
**Scroll Stopper: Ronin**  
**Source: $100k Internal**  
**Stage of Awareness: Problem Aware**  
**Persona: Avid**

\[Erika holding offset and heel-weighted driver\]

Here’s what NOT to do if you wanna fix your slice:

\[Erika tosses offset driver\]

Do NOT use an offset driver.

\[Erika tosses heel-weighted driver\]

Do NOT use a heel-weighted driver.

And do NOT try to make swing changes like flipping your wrists…

Keeping the clubface square from setup to impact…

Or swinging “inside out”.

Cause the truth is…

NONE of these “solutions” address the ROOT CAUSE of your slice:

An open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

**Intro 3: (sf1-0011-v0013)**

**Type: Guru**  
**Structure: Tutorial**  
**Angle: Controversy**  
**Scroll Stopper: Ronin**  
**Source: $100k Internal**  
**Stage of Awareness: Problem Aware**  
**Persona: Avid**

\[Erika holding an offset driver\]

If you want to fix your slice…

\[Erika tosses offset driver\]

Do NOT use an offset driver.

On top of being UGLY…

The offset face aims left at address…

So you’re gonna have a tendency to OPEN the face even more as you swing.

And a MORE open face…

Means an EVEN bigger slice.

And as I’m sure you know by now…

The ONE reason you slice is an open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

**Intro 4: (sf1-0011-v0014)**

**Type: Guru**  
**Structure: Tutorial**  
**Angle: Controversy**  
**Scroll Stopper: Ronin**  
**Source: $100k Internal**  
**Stage of Awareness: Problem Aware**  
**Persona: Avid**

\[Erika holding and tosses an offset driver\]

DO NOT use an offset driver if you wanna fix your slice.

**Intro 5: (sf1-0011-v0015)**

**Type: Guru**  
**Structure: Tutorial**  
**Angle: Controversy**  
**Scroll Stopper: Ronin**  
**Source: $100k Internal**  
**Stage of Awareness: Problem Aware**  
**Persona: Avid**

\[Erika holding a heel-weighted driver\]

If you wanna fix your slice…

\[Erika tosses heel-weighted driver\]

Do NOT use a heel-weighted driver.

Sure, the weights make it a little easier to close the face…

But weight in the heel moves the sweet spot closer to the heel too. 

So even when you DO find the middle of the face…

The driver feels and performs like a mis-hit.

And on top of the terrible feel…

The truth is…

Heel-weighted drivers do NOT address the REAL reason you slice:

An open clubface relative to the path of your swing.

**Intro 6: (sf1-0011-v0016)**

\[Erika holding and tosses a heel-weighted driver\]

Do NOT use a heel-weighted driver if you want to fix your slice.

**Intro 7: (sf1-0011-v0017)**

You do NOT need another “slice fix”.

You need driver technology that squares the clubface to the path… FOR YOU.

Cause the truth is…

Until you fix the ROOT CAUSE of your slice…

And square your clubface relative to the path…

Nothing else matters.

**Intro 8: (sf1-0011-v0018)**

To fix your slice…

You do NOT need another “swing fix”...

Like flipping your wrists through impact…

Keeping the clubface square throughout the swing…

Or swinging inside out.

**Body:**

You can have the posture and setup position of a pro…

A tour-like release…

And you can even spend months or years grooving that coveted inside-out swing path.

IT DOESN’T MATTER.

Because unless your clubface is square relative to the path of your swing…

You will slice.

Period.

And if you’re like 99% of amateurs…

The “swing fixes” you practice on the range…

BREAK DOWN under pressure on the course – when it counts.

That’s why you do NOT need another “swing fix” for your slice.

You need a DRIVER TECHNOLOGY that squares the face to the path… FOR YOU.

Until now… that tech didn’t exist…

So we engineered the FIRST driver with Square Face Technology…

That uses aerodynamic principles ~~borrowed from Formula 1~~…

To square the clubface to the path… FOR YOU.

\[toss SF1 to Erika and she catches it and continues reading\]

It’s called the SF1…

And it’s the FIRST slice-fix driver that combines ALL the known solutions for squaring the clubface at impact…

Into ONE club that does ONE thing:

Square your face to the path FOR YOU.

And that means ONE result:

Dead straight drives.

It was designed by a guy who’s spent 20 years innovating driver technology at TITLEIST…

And 35 years dialing in clubs for legends like Tiger Woods, Rory Mcllroy, and Ernie Els… just to name a few.

AND… I watched with my own two skeptical eyes as the SF1’s Square Face Technology…

Completely reversed slice after slice… 

On the VERY first swing... 

For DOZENS of golfers who tried it. 

**Close:**

And now…

The SF1 is FINALLY available to the public.

So… if you wanna learn more about the features inside Square Face Technology…

That square your face to the path FOR YOU…

Callout text:   
HAVE YOU TRIED THIS NEW ANTI-SLICE DRIVER YET?

Can this new Formula-1-inspired driver REALLY fix your slice?

Callout text:   
HANK HANEY  
WORLD’S \#1   
SLICE-FIX COACH

Hi, Hank Haney here for the SF1…

Callout text: SEVEN F1-INSPIRED FEATURES…

The world’s ONLY amateur driver that combines 7 F1-inspired features…

Callout text: AERODYNAMICALLY REVERSES YOUR SLICE

To aerodynamically reverse your slice. 

Watch this…

### **\[sf1-hook-0013 \- pc \- tech combo \- christopher \- teleprompter \- guru\]**

What do you get when you take the directional aerodynamics of ~~Formula 1~~ racing…

And infuse them with modern driver technology?

You get the SF1…

The world’s FIRST and ONLY driver built for amateur golfers…

That aerodynamically closes the clubface to fix your slice FOR YOU. 

Then play ONLY the line where George Bush says, “Now watch this drive…”[George Bush "Now, Watch This Drive"](https://youtu.be/TCm9788Tb5g?si=85ZbDAjC0mq2GwTI)

### **\[sf1-hook-0014 \- Pull It Out \- Mike \- teleprompter\]**

SF1 logo on screen  
Callout Text: karaoke-style captions

THIS is the SF1.

Pull it out of your bag…

Step up to the tee…

And say goodbye to your slice…

For good.

PROOF

### **\[sf1-hook-0015 \- He’s Worked With \- Mike \- teleprompter\]**

Callout Text \- native: Slicers… you need to see this 😲  
Callout Text: karaoke-style captions  
Use photos/clips of the golfers mentioned in the VSL… Tiger Woods, Rory Mcllroy, Jordan Spieth, Ernie Els, David Duvall, Adam Scott, and Justin Rose

He’s worked with some of the biggest names in golf…

Use clips from the VSL

And already designed over a dozen clubs on the Golf Digest Hot List.

Montage of Chris working on the SF1, make it exciting

Now he’s invented one of the biggest breakthroughs for amateurs this decade.

Hank on screen

If you’re a golfer who has a slice…

You need to see this.

### **\[sf1-hook-0016 \- It’s Because \- Mike \- teleprompter\]**

Callout Text \- native: Still slicing? Here’s why  
Clubface animation from the VSL

If you’re STILL slicing…

It’s because your clubface is open relative to the path of your swing.

And let me tell you one thing for a fact…

Your current driver isn’t helping.

So here’s a new anti-slice driver tech that fixes the root cause of your slice…

And gives you automatic draws on repeat.

Check this out.

### **\[sf1-hook-0017 \- All The Hard Work For You \- Mike \- teleprompter\]**

Callout Text: karaoke-style captions

If you want to fix your slice…

You need to STOP trying to fix your technique…

And instead let this new driver do all the hard work for you.

Introducing…

The SF1.

### **\[sf1-hook-0018 \- First Ever \- Mike \- teleprompter\]**

Callout Text \- native:   
This driver is perfect for   
mid to high handicappers 👌

Introducing the first ever driver for mid to high handicap amateurs…

Where all the features work together…

To do one thing and one thing only… 

Fix your slice.

PROOF

### **\[sf1-hook-0019 \- bad habits \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Text Overlay: Never Slice Again\]

Introducing the first ever driver that fixes ALL the bad habits in your swing… 

And makes it impossible to slice…

Ever again. 

### **\[sf1-hook-0020 \- one shot \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

You know you want to lower your scores…

Hit fairway… after fairway… after fairway…on command. 

\[B roll proof of golfers bombing shots\]

And step into every tee box with supreme confidence…

Because you KNOW you can’t miss.

Well now it’s possible… without swing or grip changes.

### **\[sf1-hook-0021 \- grip or swing changes \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Overlay: Fix Your Slice… Without Grip Or Swing Changes\]

Here’s how to instantly fix your slice…

Without grip or swing changes. 

### **\[sf1-hook-0022 \- tehnology \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Text Overlay: Best Slice Fix Club Technology 2023\]

Here’s the first-ever driver that was specifically engineered to fix your slice for good. 

Because the concealed technology squares the face to the path… 

And produces the ultimate slice-fix effect.  

\[SF1-VSL-55a \- ANIMATION: Basically the same as SF1-VSL-48 — Animation/graphic of clubface squaring at impact with callout text SQUARE FACE TECHNOLOGY. Then show DTL and transition into golfer(s) crushing straight drive(s) with tracer(s)\]

T2 \- Overlay Callout: ONE THING ONLY

T2 \- Overlay Callout:   
THE SLICE-FIX EFFECT  
SQUARES THE FACE FOR YOU

That means you don’t need to change your swing or grip…

And you’ll NEVER slice again. 

### **\[sf1-hook-0023 \- low scores \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Overlay: Any Amateur Can Gain Distance & Accuracy If They Just Do This\]

Want to know the fastest way to gain distance… 

Fix your slice…

And quickly lower your scores? 

Check this out… 

### **\[sf1-hook-0024 \- fairways \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Text Overlay: Do This To Hit Twice As Many Fairways\]

Want to hit twice as many fairways the next time you play…

Without grip or swing changes of any kind. 

Check this out… 

### **\[sf1-hook-0025 \- senior \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Overlay: Best Tip For Senior Golfers 2023\]

Want to know how any senior golfer can add distance and double their fairways hit?

Check this out.

### **\[sf1-hook-0026 \- ten plus \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Overlay: Best Tweak For Mid to High Handicappers\]

If you’re a 10+ handicap you need to see this.

Because it instantly fixes your slice… 

Gives you more distance… 

And doubles your fairways hit. 

### **\[sf1-hook-0027 \- two second \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Overlay: Simple Driver Change Gives Amateurs 35 Yards of Accurate Distance\] 

Here’s a 2 second change that gives you up to 35 yards of added distance…

And fixes your slice for good. 

### **\[sf1-hook-0028 \- amateur \- tanner \- teleprompter\]**

\[Overlay: The BEST Driver For Amateur Golfers 2023\]

This is hands down the BEST driver for amateur golfers. 

Because it squares the clubface for you.

So you hit the ball flush… double your fairways hit… And add up to 35 yards of distance.

All without swing changes or swinging harder. 

### **\[sf1-hook-0029 \- ben \- teleprompter\]**

THIS is the SF1…

The first and ONLY driver…

That combines EVERY known slice-fixing feature…

Into ONE technology…

That squares your clubface relative to the path FOR YOU…

And makes it LITERALLY impossible to slice.

And right now… It’s 73% OFF\!

### **\[sf1-hook-0030 \- ben \- teleprompter\]**

THIS is the SF1…

The FIRST and ONLY anti-slice driver designed for amateurs…

Where ALL the features are working together to do ONE thing and ONE thing ONLY…

Square your face relative to the path…

So you can finally STOP SLICING.

And right now… It’s 73% OFF\!

### **\[sf1-hook-0031 \- ben \- teleprompter\]**

I’m Hank Haney…

And I’ve fixed over 200,000 amateur slices using training and drills.

And now…

I teamed up with Tiger’s former club engineer…

Who ALSO spent over 20 years innovating driver technology at TITLEIST…

To create the FIRST driver…

That fixes your slice FOR YOU.
